response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with C++ and has worked on various software development projects, but lacks direct experience in industrial automation and some specific technologies mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Experience with C++ and other programming languages
Strong background in software development and testing
Proven ability to work on diverse projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in industrial automation
No clear experience with cloud technologies like Microsoft Azure
Limited exposure to specific protocols mentioned in the job description
